title: Resource
description: A Resource is a core noun of a business domain — a named entity that the system tracks, manages, or operates on. Resources have identity, persist over time, and are the subject of Actions.

name.description: The singular PascalCase name of the resource.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this resource represents in the domain.
examples: A financial loan issued to a borrower with repayment terms.
A record of a commercial transaction owed by a customer.

namespace.description: The dot-separated namespace path this resource belongs to.

attributes.description: The attributes (fields) that describe this resource.

actions.description: The actions that can be performed on this resource.

examples.name: Loan
examples.description: A financial loan issued to a borrower with repayment terms.

examples.name: Post
examples.description: A published article or piece of content authored by a user.

examples.name: Employee
examples.description: A person employed by the organization.
